name: United Arab Emirates
authority: Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) / Central Bank of the UAE (CBUAE)

unhostedWallets.notes: VARA and CBUAE require risk assessment for unhosted wallet transfers. Enhanced due diligence and verification required above AED 3,500.

rules.notes: VARA Virtual Assets and Related Activities Regulations effective February 7, 2023. CBUAE issued complementary travel rule guidance. ADGM (Abu Dhabi) effectively applies no threshold. This file captures the VARA/federal perspective.
